since_last: 18% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads -0.03%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 18% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.51% · BTC -1.40% · Gold -1.48% · Nasdaq100 -1.62%. 18% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at -0.03%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.03%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.96%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -13.04%
cards.body: Leaders: ZBRA +5.03%, AVAV +4.88%, INTU +4.63%, ADBE +3.98%, SAP +3.25%. Laggards: SKHY -13.04%, MRVL -9.98%, OKLO -9.60%, SMR -9.21%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.12% at $126.99
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.12% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
